title: Project Miner Exception Review and PM Decision Detail Disclosure Controls
objective: Reduce day-to-day PM workbench scan burden by wrapping only the existing /pm-review/import-intake Exception review and PM decision detail panel in a browser-native, default-open disclosure control while preserving its placement inside Source and Exception Detail after Workflow Gates, aria label, warning card, PM decision card, warning severity/code pills, decision prompt/recommended action text, fallback empty states, export behavior, no-storage behavior, no-authority wording, read seams, and no-authority boundary.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Usability Implementer
implemented_scope: Convert the existing Exception review and PM decision detail panel wrapper to a native default-open disclosure control.
Preserve the Exception review and PM decision detail aria label.
Keep the panel inside Source and Exception Detail after Workflow Gates.

Preserve the existing warning card, PM decision card, warning severity/code pills, decision prompt/recommended action text, fallback empty states, export behavior, no-storage behavior, and no-authority wording.

Preserve existing storage behavior, read seams, route links, quick-jump rail, output actions, output statuses, helper disclosures, detail disclosures, handoff-guide disclosure, workflow-map disclosure, open-items disclosure, snapshot disclosure, operating-queue disclosure, import-exception-register disclosure, and workflow-gates disclosure.

Add focused smoke coverage proving default-open state, collapse/reopen behavior, hidden/visible exception and decision child cards, fixture warning/decision content still visible when open, absence of exception-review/pm-decision disclosure-state localStorage keys, and continued PM Lane 083 authority guard posture.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
sidecar_result: A read-only sidecar from PM Lane 096 recommended PM Lane 097 as Project Miner Exception Review and PM Decision Detail Disclosure Controls. The recommendation was accepted as a browser-local AI/orchestration exception-and-decision ergonomics slice. A separate read-only sidecar completed a PM Lane 098 scout and recommended Project Miner Admission And Approval Contract Disclosure Controls as the next non-overlapping lane, with no write ownership in this tranche.
allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page Exception review and PM decision detail panel wrapper markup.
Modify focused operations-web smoke tests for default-open exception/decision detail disclosure controls and no persisted collapse state.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.
not_allowed: No warning severity or code pill change.
No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
